_meta.name: okta-create-group
_meta.description: Create a new group in the Okta admin console. Navigates to /admin/groups, clicks 'Add group', fills in name and description, and saves.
_meta.author: session-2026-04-14

auth.note: Okta OAuth PKCE — session must already be active at trial-8689388-admin.okta.com

anomalies: perceive required instead of read — Okta SPA
Add group link seen in 05-list-groups abstractTargets as href='#' text='Add group'
After save, Okta may navigate to the new group's detail page — perceive to confirm

chain.note: Navigate to groups list. Hard-coded to avoid chrome-extension:// resolution bug.
Wait for MUI table to render
Confirm groups page loaded and 'Add group' button is visible.
Perceive add group form. Expect: Name input, Description input, Save/Add button.
Type group name — Okta uses profile.name not name
Type group description — Okta uses profile.description
Submit the form — Okta uses input[type=submit] not a Save button
Verify group was created. Should see group detail page or groups list with new group present.

group-name-input.description: Name field in Add Group dialog
group-name-input.resolveHint: Input labeled 'Name' inside Add Group modal

group-description-input.description: Description field in Add Group dialog
group-description-input.resolveHint: Input or textarea labeled 'Description' inside Add Group modal
